info.description: API for Nyarikos - Kost Management System
info.title: Nyarikos API

get.description: Redirect to Google OAuth login page
Handle Google OAuth callback and authenticate user

post.description: Login with email and password to get access and refresh tokens
Logout user and revoke refresh token
Get a new access token using a refresh token
Register a new user with email, password, and optional details

400.description: Invalid request or no available rooms

get.description: Get a list of all available facilities
Get a paginated list of all kosts

post.description: Create a new kost listing (requires pemilik role)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific kost

post.description: Upload and add an image to a kost listing (requires ownership)

get.description: Get all rooms belonging to a specific kost

post.description: Create a new room for a specific kost

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific room

post.description: Create a Midtrans Snap payment for a booking

409.description: Payment already exists or booking already paid

post.description: Add a facility to a specific room

delete.description: Remove a facility from a specific room

get.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Update the profile of the currently authenticated user

description.example: A comfortable kost near the university
